title: Procure cybersecurity consulting for ISO 27001 audit
description: We need to engage a cybersecurity consulting firm to prepare for an ISO 27001 certification audit scheduled for Q4 2026. Budget ceiling: EUR 75,000. Required scope: gap analysis against ISO 27001 controls, remediation roadmap, internal audit dry run, and audit support. Vendor must have at least 5 prior ISO 27001 certifications delivered in the EU and SOC 2 Type II credentials. Engagement timeline: contract signed within 45 days, delivery within 5 months. Evaluate at least three firms and recommend one.
